profile.name: Felipe Carvajal Brown
profile.bio: Software engineer, MSc in Numerical Simulations. Rust, Python, TypeScript. I build public-interest tools, for free. Open to work. Santiago, Chile + remote.

repos.name: Keel
repos.description: Automatic mixing and mastering for finished stems. A deterministic, open-source Python engine that loudness-balances stems into a stereo mix and masters it to an exact LUFS target with a true-peak limiter (ITU-R BS.1770-4). Same stems in, same master out — no AI, no subscription.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

repos.name: MaskOps
repos.description: High-speed PII masking as a Polars plugin — powered by Rust

repos.name: brown-fps-creator-showcase
repos.description: Brown FPS Creator - a no-code, visual first-person shooter game maker for Windows, Linux, and Steam Deck. Build a complete FPS without writing code.

repos.name: fcarvajalbrown
repos.description: Software Engineer, MSc in Numerical Simulations. Rust, Python, TypeScript. Public-interest tools. Santiago, Chile, open to remote.

repos.name: MuniANCI
repos.description: Escáner de cumplimiento de ciberseguridad para organismos del Estado chileno, alineado a Ley 21.663; y las Instrucciones Generales de la ANCI.  Combina escaneo activo de red con un cuestionario declarativo para producir un informe de brechas en PDF y un reporte JSON listo para CSIRT Chile.

repos.name: Entropy-Collapse-Simulator
repos.description: Calibration-free structural robustness index (R_S) from the Shannon entropy of strain energy, for planar steel frames and trusses under the alternate-load-path (member-removal) method. Verified Python finite-element solver with a progressive-collapse criteria comparison.

repos.name: Segovia
repos.description: A fast, memory-bounded Rust engine for electrophysiology signal processing — Neuropixels-scale, callable from Python.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

repos.name: website-business
repos.description: Personal site for Felipe Carvajal Brown — software developer based in Santiago, Chile.

repos.name: pipeonjoy
repos.description: Vaporwave composition wizard — AI-free, lyrics-driven, modal. Win98 GUI + live FluidSynth previews.

repos.name: SentinelNode
repos.description: Self-hosted security dashboard — scans directories for leaked secrets and audits HTTP security headers. Powered by Rust and Node.js, deployable with Docker Compose.

repos.name: Cobolarium
repos.description: A friendly desktop app that lets anyone write COBOL, hit Run, and see real mainframe output — without owning a mainframe, knowing JCL, or paying IBM.

repos.name: DiskChurn
repos.description: Fast, single-scan Windows disk analyzer in Rust. Reads the NTFS Master File Table directly to classify folders by growth behavior, project when your disk will fill up, estimate compression savings via Shannon entropy, and compare snapshots over time — all in one native egui window.

repos.name: Symbio-Grid
repos.description: An evolutionary mycelial automaton. Plant and fungi agents trade resources and mutate their rule-tables across generations until a stable bio-economy emerges — or collapses.  Two programs, one repo.

repos.name: somoselmejorpais
repos.description: Dashboard satírico que celebra la identidad nacional chilena. Agrega rankings reales e inventados y los presenta como victorias nacionales irrefutables.

repos.name: book-agent
repos.description: LangGraph pipeline that turns a Markdown book draft into a Lulu-compliant PDF.

repos.name: Agentic-CS-Paper-Makers
repos.description: A CLI-first, GUI-ready multi-agent workflow for producing structured computer science and game theory papers. Go orchestrator + embedded Python LLM bridge.

repos.name: leychile-epub
repos.description: 📚 Generador de ePub para legislación chilena - Convert Chilean laws to professional eBooks

repos.name: Nano-FII
repos.description: Minimalist Python-to-Zig FFI bridge. 79ns call overhead via comptime trampolines — 4x faster than ctypes

repos.name: PulsOS
repos.description: A live process monitor for macOS — built in plain C with SDL2, Dear ImGui, and Metal. Treemap view, sortable process list, per-PID sparklines, CPU heatmap. No Electron. No Python. No abstractions you didn't write yourself. Optimized for the Apple M4 unified memory architecture.

repos.name: USM-Pygame
repos.description: Plataforma de aprendizaje de Python y POO mediante juegos Atari rotos. Desarrollado para primer año de Ingeniería en Diseño de Videojuegos, Universidad Santa María.

repos.name: Auth4Free
repos.description: A secure, modular authentication library for Rust applications. Features password validation, JWT tokens, bcrypt hashing, and comprehensive security tools. Perfect for developers building secure web services and APIs.

repos.name: port-scanner
repos.description: Infrastructure recon tool — resolves domains via DNS and scans for open ports.

repos.name: ddos-detection
repos.description: This tool is designed to simulate DDoS (Distributed Denial of Service) attacks on specified targets for testing purposes.

repos.name: actualidadsocialchile
repos.description: Condensando el Cuarto Poder

repos.name: WavForge
repos.description: A lightweight, clean audio editor. No telemetry, no plugin bloat, no UI clutter.

repos.name: Game-of-Life-SVG
repos.description: Procedurally rendered Conway's Game of Life compiled to WebAssembly — cells morph from dots to polygons to polar flowers based on age.

repos.name: Y2K-Scare-Maze
repos.description: First-person maze game built with Bevy 0.15. Navigate a procedurally generated 20x20 maze, find the terminal, and fix the Y2K bug before time runs out.

repos.name: Cacaroids
repos.description: Like Asteroids but with Poop

repos.name: Costo-Real-Licitacion-Nuble
repos.description: Análisis de costo de licitación de software hospitalario vs. alternativas de inversión en salud pública chilena

repos.name: Chile-Terremotea-Sim
repos.description: Simulador de terremotos en tiempo real para Chile con modelos de movimiento del suelo específicos por ciudad y visualización interactiva

repos.name: SMA-Multas
repos.description: Transparencia de multas ambientales no pagadas en Chile

repos.name: Email-Scrap---Verifier
repos.description: Python CLI for web email extraction and SMTP verification with interactive interface

repos.name: Mermaid-Generator
repos.description: Generador configurable de diagramas Mermaid basado en jerarquías de carpetas y archivos de repositorios locales.

repos.name: Slurry-FDM-Solver
repos.description: Implementación en Python del método de diferencias finitas para flujo de slurry plástico 1D y 2D.

repos.name: Go-on-Go
repos.description: Implementación del juego Go en Go, con motor de reglas, modelado de estado y arquitectura modular.

repos.name: Metalcon-Calculadora-Vigas
repos.description: Calculadora de simulación en tres puntos con dos cargas variables para los perfiles básicos de Metalcon; fabricados por CINTAC.
